migration.apiNote: Expo API: react-native/src/config/expoFrameworkConfig.js (Railway default). Metro replaces packages/framework/src/config. Optional react-native/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL for local Rails.
migration.revenueCatNote: react-native-purchases is linked for iOS/Android. Use a dev build (expo-dev-client): `npx expo run:ios` — Expo Go cannot run real IAP. Optional EXPO_PUBLIC_REVENUECAT_IOS_API_KEY in react-native/.env (see .env.example).
